I have to be honest about #SteamNextFest

I always start the week with high hopes and very motivated.

But when it's ending, I only feel rage and anger because there's so many games that I didn't get to play. It's so frustating. There's 3000+ games out

MORE GAMES MORE GAMES MORE GAMES

#IndieGame #SteamNextFest

Next Fest is back!!

Here's a manifesto about it! For me Steam Next Fest is the purest form of Indie Games expression. I see SNF as a cult and I'm happily part of the congregation 

Do you agree? Have you ever participated on the event? What's your experience being a dev?

Looking for beautiful, atmospheric and mysterious games?
We got you covered.
Check out our showcase on April 9th for announcements from these gems!
#iiishowcase

So proud we managed to push this hidden gem to success by revealing it in our first ever showcase!
Horrible to think that no-one would have discovered it otherwise

It's not Dungeon Keeper
It's not Legend of Keepers
It's not Rogue Tower

But if our indie game reminds you of them... we're probably doing something right!
#indiegame #roguelike #gamedev

It's a big week for #TurnBasedThursday!
We're honored to host today’s thread on X during the #TurnBasedThursdayFest! 

#IndieDev and #GameDev folks, we're eager to see your turn-based games in the replies! 

/ your favorites and @ others you love!

What’s new?

#DeathHowl is part of #TurnBasedThursdayFest 

Ro’s journey through the spirit world joins over 450 great turn-based titles!

Take a look at the festival and discover more below

We’re starting public playtests for the brand new REBIRTH Mode in #DeathHowl 

Unlocked after completing the game on Normal, this mode raises the stakes with every enemy being enhanced in some way, some with new abilities, and reworked Realmless cards that shift how you play

Happy to announce #Moldwasher will be making a splash at #PAXEast in Boston! 
Stop by booth No. 15078 to play our game, get a pin and chat

WAX HEADS

From Patattie Games and 
@curvegames
, 
@WaxHeadsGame
 is a cozy-punk narrative sim about working in a struggling record store. As announced at #IndieFanFest, the game will launch on May 5. Play the demo now!

【 G-EIGHT抵達TIGS！帶領台灣四款優質獨立遊戲進軍東京  】
3/20(五)～21(六)兩天我們在 TOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMIT 2026 (TIGS) 現場，
帶著四款代表台灣不同風格、展現強大開發實力的優質作品，
要讓日本玩家看見台灣獨立遊戲的魅力！

 本次 G-EIGHT 展團精選陣容：
《Estella》｜Imanity Co.

[2025 G-EIGHT Game Show] A Three-Day Journey of Chasing Dreams

This video captures the most authentic moments of G-EIGHT 2025

The developers who are always within reach, the players who lose track of time, and the moving moments when hard work is finally recognized.

Every
